narrative:
Gilead Township has 3,960 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
